nasb.text: Then Joseph answered and said, “This is its interpretation: the three baskets are three days;

esv.text: And Joseph answered and said, “This is its interpretation: the three baskets are three days.

cnv.text: 約瑟回答：“這夢的解釋是這樣：三個籃子就是三天。

ccb.text: 约瑟说：“这梦的意思是，三筐就是三天，

csbs.text: 约瑟就回应说：“梦的解释是这样的：三个篮子就是三天。
